About this view

Each point is a unique ionic liquid (ID = ILTHERMO compound code). Coordinates are 2D UMAP embeddings of normalized Mordred 2D descriptors computed from the canonical SMILES. Three UMAP hyper-parameter settings are provided so you can compare local vs global structure (see pair-code.github.io/understanding-umap for an intuition primer).

Interactions: click a point → details panel renders the molecule via SMILES-Drawer; drag-select with the lasso/box tool → subset stats and histogram update; type in the search box → matching points are highlighted with a red ring; "Export selection CSV" downloads the current subset (or all visible if nothing is selected); "Show 3-config compare" reveals small-multiples linked to the same dataset and color mode.

Source CSVs: UMAP/<property>/<property>_umap_<config>.csv and UMAP/umap_<config>.csv.
